name: Baked Orange Pork Chops
recipeInstructions:
1. Arrange the pork chops in a casserole dish.
2. Sprinkle each pork chop with salt and pepper.
3. Top each pork chop with an even layer of flour.
4. Place orange slices on top of the flour.
5. Pour orange juice over the top of the pork chops and orange slices.
6. Cover the dish with foil.
7. Bake in a preheated oven at 350 degrees Fahrenheit for 1 hour and 30 minutes, or until the pork chops are tender.
Randy Rigg
